DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT STEPHANIE FAVRESSE, HOWE, ROBERT, TRUSTEE OF THE HOWE TRUST, HOWE, MARGERY H., TRUSTEE OF THE HOWE TRUST NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR FURTHER DISCOVERY RESPOSNES BY PLTFS SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES [SET ONE]; REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS [SET ONE]; SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES [SET ONE]; A MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO COMPEL COMPLIANCE PURSUANT TO CCP 2031.32; AND FOR AWARD OF MONETARY SANCTIONS IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. AFTER HEARING, THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED AS TO THE RESOLUTION OF ALL SUBSTANTIVE DISCOVERY ISSUES. THE COURT TAKES UNDER ADVISEMENT THE IMPOSITION OF MONETARY SANCTIONS WHICH WILL BE DETERMINED AT THE TIME OF THE SIGNING OF THE FILING OF THE FINAL ORDER. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO THE LANGUAGE OF THE ORDER WHICH SHALL BE INITIALLY DRAFTED BY THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)

Defendants Stephanie Favresse, Robert Howe, And Margery H. Howe'S Motion For Discovery Responses For Further Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: Hearing was required on the tentative ruling, but appearances were excused by the Court. DEFENDANTS STEPHANIE FAVRESSE, ROBERT HOWE and MARGERY H. HOWE'S Motion For Discovery Responses is granted in part. The Court prepared and signed the order in open court. (See scanned order for the Court's complete ruling.) Clerk to serve the order on all parties. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Further Discovery Resposnes By Pltfs Special Interrogatories [Set One]; Request For Production Of Documents And Things [Set One]; Special Interrogatories [Set One]; A Motion For An Order To Compel Compliance Pursuant To Ccp 2031.32; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. (415-626-6494) for Walter Renner, Plaintiff and opposing party.
Kari Bowyer, Esq, of Steven Adair MacDonald & Associates, (415-956-6488 ext 12) for Robert Howe, Trustee of Howe Trust, Defendant and moving party.

9:00 am.
Parties meet and confer in the hallway per order of the Judge Pro Tem.

10:00 am
Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court having considered the moving, opposing and reply papers and the arguments of counsel, rules as follows: DEFENDANT STEPHANIE FAVRESSE, HOWE, ROBERT, TRUSTEE OF THE HOWE TRUST, HOWE, MARGERY H., TRUSTEE OF THE HOWE TRUST Notice Of Motion And Motion For Further Discovery Resposnes By Pltfs Special Interrogatories [Set One]; Request For Production Of Documents And Things [Set One]; Special Interrogatories [Set One]; A Motion For An Order To Compel Compliance Pursuant To Ccp 2031.32; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions is taken under submission. After hearing, the parties have agreed as to the resolution of all substantive discovery issues. The Court takes under advisement the imposition of monetary sanctions which will be determined at the time of the signing of the filing of the final order. Parties to meet and confer as to the language of the order which shall be initially drafted by the moving party. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
